# Becoming AI Native Retreat 2026

> Official bilingual website for a private, two-day retreat organized by Torrenegra & Co during SF Tech Week 2026.

## Canonical pages

- [Spanish event page](/es)
- [English event page](/en)

## Direct facts

- Name: Becoming AI Native Retreat
- Dates: October 5-6, 2026
- Schedule: Monday 11:00 a.m.-9:00 p.m.; Tuesday 11:00 a.m.-5:30 p.m.
- Location: Alex Torrenegra's private residence in Napa Valley, California
- Organizer: [Torrenegra & Co](https://www.torrenegra.com)
- Hosts: Alexander Torrenegra, Tania Zapata and Alan Arguello
- Capacity: 50 people, access by application
- Contact: hola@torrenegra.com

## Experience

The retreat synthesizes lessons from working with hundreds of companies, building technology businesses, using AI tools directly and speaking with AI labs, founders and operators across Latin America and Silicon Valley. Participants compare those cross-industry patterns with one recurring task, deliverable or process from their own organization, redesign it and build a first version they can evaluate.

The format repeats four steps: a short explanation, one live volunteer case, individual work on each participant's own organization and a group review of selected results.

## Who it is for

Founders, business owners and team leaders from startups, small businesses, scaleups, enterprises and public institutions can apply. Programming knowledge is not required.

## Included

Access includes both working days, Monday lunch and dinner, Tuesday lunch, beverages and snacks, materials, in-room facilitation and group transportation between San Francisco and Napa. Flights and lodging are not included.

## Pricing

Pricing is per person and changes by confirmation date: USD 1,450 through July 31, USD 1,750 through August 15, USD 2,150 through August 31 and USD 2,450 from September 1 onward.
